canon_basis.rule: live runtime commands require explicit owner authorization in the active thread
canon_basis.standing_approval_phrase: разрешаю тебе любые законные действия в рамках разработки проекта

authorization_audit.finding: current thread-visible user messages do not contain canonically sufficient owner authorization for live runtime commands

blocker_audit.finding: all currently checked non-authorization preflight gates are satisfied; live execution still must stop on any active or ambiguous lock state reported later by command packets

decision.allowed_next_action: obtain canonical owner authorization in-thread before healthcheck --json
decision.forbidden_next_action: do not run live runtime commands before authorization
